name: namedReference
description: Handle identifier for a generic reference relationship with explicit predicate and target.
ExpectedUse: Expressing arbitrary relationships between FDOs with additional predicates.

Properties.Name: relationshipPredicate
Properties.Title: Relationship Predicate
Properties.Description: DataCite relation type defining the nature of the relationship (e.g., 'cites', 'isSupplementTo', 'references').

Properties.Name: target
Properties.Title: Target Identifier
Properties.Description: Persistent identifier (DOI, Handle) of the referenced FDO.
